description.value:
Daemon World

Daemon worlds are scars upon reality where survival means enduring horrors no sane mind should witness. Those who escape them alive carry permanent marks of the Warp, and often know truths the Imperium would rather never face directly. Their souls are not untouched, but sheer endurance in such places leaves them with instincts for the Immaterium that few mortals possess.

Homeworld Bonus

+Willpower, +Perception, -Fellowship

Homeworld Aptitude

Willpower

Wounds

7+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 4+)

Homeworld Trait

Touched by the Warp: A daemon world native begins with one rank in the Psyniscience skill. Should he gain this skill again in a later step of character creation, he instead gains one additional rank in the skill. He cannot purchase more ranks in this skill unless he acquires the Psyker aptitude. This character also begins with 1d10+5 Corruption points.

specialAbilities.name: Touched by the Warp
specialAbilities.description: A daemon world native begins with one rank in the Psyniscience skill. Should he gain this skill again in a later step of character creation, he instead gains one additional rank in the skill. He cannot purchase more ranks in this skill unless he acquires the Psyker aptitude. This character also begins with 1d10+5 Corruption points.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 4+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point. The character starts with 1d10+5 Corruption points.
